overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit Japanese-inspired urban district at night. The player character moves from an elevated metal platform down through cherry blossom-lined corridors and narrow commercial alleys before emerging onto an open waterfront promenade with views of futuristic skyscrapers.

events.description: descending from metal grate platform onto wet concrete alley floor
entering covered corridor with intensified neon lighting from advertisement screens

agents.ego_description: walking down from an elevated metal platform into a narrow neon-lit alleyway with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with drainage grates reflecting neon lights
stained concrete walls with graffiti and weathered paint
large illuminated billboards displaying animated advertisements
traditional Japanese-style white paper lanterns hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated metal grate platform overlooking a narrow alley. The player descends onto wet concrete surrounded by yellow walls covered in graffiti. As they proceed, they enter a covered corridor illuminated by digital advertisement screens and traditional paper lanterns hanging overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cherry blossom covered walkway with hanging paper lanterns

events.description: entering the cherry blossom corridor with purple illuminated trees overhead
passing under dense canopy of cherry blossoms with purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: strolling through a covered walkway illuminated by paper lanterns and purple cherry blossoms

entered.detail: dense overhead coverage of cherry blossom trees with purple artificial lighting
cherry trees with vibrant purple neon lighting highlighting the blossoms
red and white traditional Japanese lanterns suspended across the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player enters a magical corridor covered by a dense canopy of cherry blossoms illuminated with purple neon light. Traditional red paper lanterns hang overhead between the trees, creating a tunnel-like effect. The walkway is lined with digital advertisement screens on the left and shop entrances on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit commercial alley with vendor stalls

events.description: passing by a standing pedestrian with blonde hair and visible back tattoos
slight turn to the right while navigating the narrow shop-lined passage

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alley lined with neon storefronts and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: standing with hands on hips, wearing a leather vest with prominent back tattoos and blonde hair

entered.detail: red and white vendor stall with goods displayed on counter
tall illuminated signs with Japanese characters and cyberpunk branding
doorways to commercial establishments with glowing frames

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrower cobblestone alley lined with vertical neon signs and shop fronts. A vendor cart appears on the right, and a tattooed pedestrian stands nearby. The cherry blossoms continue overhead but the environment feels more commercial with prominent advertising and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade under highway overpass with city skyline views

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open promenade with view of distant skyscrapers
view opens to reveal massive futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking along an open promenade under an overpass with expansive views of the distant illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with support pillars
futuristic glass and steel towers with illuminated windows and neon rooftop lighting
long white concrete seating structures along the walkway
standalone digital billboard structures displaying product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow alley onto a wide concrete promenade under a massive highway overpass. The scene opens dramatically to reveal a stunning view of distant futuristic skyscrapers illuminated against the night sky. Concrete benches line the walkway, and standalone advertising kiosks display digital billboards. The atmosphere shifts from intimate and enclosed to expansive and urban.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an enclosed, neon-lit urban corridor into a vast, futuristic cityscape. It begins on an elevated metal grate platform, descending onto wet concrete and through graffiti-covered yellow walls before entering a covered walkway illuminated by digital screens and paper lanterns. As the camera moves forward, the environment transforms into a magical tunnel of purple neon-lit cherry blossoms and red lanterns that line a path of shops and advertisements. The scene then shifts into a narrower cobblestone alley filled with vertical neon signs and vendor carts, maintaining the overhead blossoms while becoming more commercial. Finally, the camera emerges from the intimate alley onto a wide concrete promenade beneath a massive highway overpass, opening up to a dramatic view of distant, glowing skyscrapers against the night sky.
